Environmental Protection.summary: Sullivan has consistently opposed federal environmental regulations, supporting Alaska resource development and opposing EPA restrictions.
voted_for: ANWR oil drilling authorization in Tax Cuts and Jobs Act (Senate vote, December 2017)
Willow Project approval support (Public statement, March 2023)
voted_against: Build Back Better Act with climate provisions (Senate vote, 2021)
EPA Clean Power Plan regulations (Congressional review, 2017)

Criminal Justice Reform.summary: Sullivan supported the First Step Act but has generally taken conservative positions on criminal justice.
voted_for: First Step Act of 2018 (Senate vote, December 2018)

Progressive Taxation.summary: Sullivan has consistently opposed tax increases on corporations and high earners.
voted_for: Tax Cuts and Jobs Act of 2017 (Senate vote, December 2017)
voted_against: Corporate tax increase proposals in Build Back Better Act (Senate, 2021)

Reproductive Health Rights.summary: Sullivan identifies as pro-life and has supported restrictions on abortion access.
voted_for: Pain-Capable Unborn Child Protection Act (Senate vote, January 2018)
voted_against: Women's Health Protection Act (Senate vote, February 2022)
Women's Health Protection Act (Senate vote, May 2022)

LGBTQ+ Rights.summary: Sullivan voted for same-sex marriage protections but has opposed other LGBTQ+ legislation.
voted_for: Respect for Marriage Act (Senate vote, November 2022)

Environmental Protection.summary: Murkowski balances Alaska resource development with some environmental protections, supporting climate research while backing oil and gas development.
voted_for: Willow Project approval support (Public statement, March 2023)
ANWR oil drilling authorization (Senate vote, December 2017)
voted_against: Green New Deal resolution (Senate vote, March 2019)

Police Accountability.summary: Murkowski has expressed support for police reform discussions but opposed the George Floyd Justice in Policing Act.
voted_against: George Floyd Justice in Policing Act (Procedural vote failed, Senate, September 2021)

Criminal Justice Reform.summary: Murkowski has been a consistent supporter of bipartisan criminal justice reform efforts.
voted_for: First Step Act of 2018 (Senate vote, December 2018)

Progressive Taxation.summary: Murkowski generally opposes progressive tax increases but has supported some corporate minimum tax provisions.
voted_for: Tax Cuts and Jobs Act of 2017 (Senate vote, December 2017)
Inflation Reduction Act with corporate minimum tax (Senate vote, August 2022)

Reproductive Health Rights.summary: Murkowski is pro-choice and has voted to protect abortion access.
voted_for: Women's Health Protection Act (Senate vote, February 2022)
Women's Health Protection Act (Senate vote, May 2022)
voted_against: Pain-Capable Unborn Child Protection Act (Senate vote, January 2018)

LGBTQ+ Rights.summary: Murkowski has supported LGBTQ+ rights legislation including marriage equality and employment protections.
voted_for: Respect for Marriage Act (Senate vote, November 2022)
Employment Non-Discrimination Act support (Public statements, 2013)

Public School Funding.summary: Murkowski has supported federal education funding increases and opposed deep cuts to education programs.
voted_for: Consolidated Appropriations Acts with education funding increases (Multiple votes, 2018-2024)
